term: Tic Tac Toe Tick Tack Toe
englishDefinitions: A simple game played on a 3×3 grid, where players try to get three marks in a row.
A casual variant spelling or pronunciation of tic-tac-toe.
persianTranslation: بازی سادهٔ سه‌تایی در یک جدول ۳×۳
examples: We played tic tac toe during the long car ride.
Children often learn tic-tac-toe at a very young age.
She drew a tic tac toe board on a napkin.
